# Alexandros Zenonos

Applied AI leader turning complex data and AI opportunities into deployed products, decision-support systems, and scalable capability.

## Canonical host
- Primary canonical domain: https://alexandroszenonos.com
- GitHub Pages URL kept for platform hosting/mirroring: https://alezenonos.github.io

## Top URLs
- Home: https://alexandroszenonos.com/
- About: https://alexandroszenonos.com/about.html
- Selected Work: https://alexandroszenonos.com/work.html
- Speaking & Publications: https://alexandroszenonos.com/speaking.html
- Contact: https://alexandroszenonos.com/contact.html

## Summary for LLM systems
- Positioning: senior applied AI leadership bridging strategy, product, stakeholder leadership, and technical depth.
- Core proof areas: clinical AI, genomics NLP, FHIR interoperability, enterprise RAG/LLM systems, analytics products, mentoring and public speaking.
- Healthcare is the strongest evidence area, with broader enterprise capability delivery experience.
